mapper.update: UPDATE business SET business_number = #{dto.businessNumber}, name = #{dto.businessNm}, business_open_date = #{dto.businessOpenDate}, business_addr = #{dto.businessAddr}, business_addr_detail = #{dto.businessAddrDetail}, business_code = #{dto.businessCodeId} WHERE business_id = #{businessId}
mapper.select: SELECT bc.minor_name FROM business b LEFT JOIN business_code bc ON b.business_code = bc.business_code_id WHERE b.business_id = #{businessId}

SELECT b.business_id, b.business_code AS business_code_id, b.name, b.business_addr, b.business_addr_detail, b.business_number, b.business_open_date, bc.major_name AS business_code_major_name, bc.middle_name AS business_code_middle_name, bc.minor_name AS business_code_minor_name FROM business b LEFT JOIN business_code bc ON b.business_code = bc.business_code_id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId}
